posts.author: emilyRW (Emily Blattel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

It would be so handy to have a timetracking widget in the page header (across all boards and workspaces) showing where you are currently tracking time and also allowing you to quickly switch to different trackers.

What are you trying to achieve

This allows users who are tracking billable time across projects and clients to easily and more accurately bill their time.
